highLegibilityFont.title: nasin sitelen pi lukin pona
highLegibilityFont.desc: ilo ni li kepeken e nasin sitelen pi lukin pona kepeken ala e nasin sitelen pi ilo wile

useAccentColor.title: kule namako ilo
useAccentColor.desc: ilo li kepeken kule namako pi wile sina

reducedMotion.title: tawa ala
reducedMotion.desc: ijo pi ilo ni li tawa ala

disableCovers.title: ijo kulupu li jo ala e selo

themeIsAmoled.title: nasin pi pimeja wawa
themeIsAmoled.desc: nasin ni la nasin pimeja la ilo li pimeja wawa. nasin ante la ilo li kepeken nasin ni la ilo sitelen li ken pali lili.

themeIsVibrant.title: nasin pi kule mute
themeIsVibrant.desc: nasin ni la ilo li kule mute.
